From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

This article is about the Boogaloo Joe Jones album. For other uses, see [No Way](/wiki/No_Way_(disambiguation) "No Way (disambiguation)").

1971 studio album by Boogaloo Joe Jones

| No Way! | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| [Studio album](/wiki/Album "Album") by [Boogaloo Joe Jones](/wiki/Ivan_%22Boogaloo_Joe%22_Jones "Ivan \"Boogaloo Joe\" Jones") | |
| Released | 1971 |
| Recorded | November 23, 1970 |
| Studio | [Van Gelder Studio](/wiki/Van_Gelder_Studio "Van Gelder Studio"), Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey |
| [Genre](/wiki/Music_genre "Music genre") | [Jazz](/wiki/Jazz "Jazz") |
| Length | 35:59 |
| [Label](/wiki/Record_label "Record label") | [Prestige](/wiki/Prestige_Records "Prestige Records") PR 10004 |
| [Producer](/wiki/Record_producer "Record producer") | [Bob Porter](/wiki/Bob_Porter_(record_producer) "Bob Porter (record producer)") |
| [Boogaloo Joe Jones](/wiki/Ivan_%22Boogaloo_Joe%22_Jones "Ivan \"Boogaloo Joe\" Jones") chronology | |
| |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | | *[Right On Brother](/wiki/Right_On_Brother "Right On Brother")* (1970) | ***No Way!*** (1971) | *[What It Is](/wiki/What_It_Is_(Boogaloo_Joe_Jones_album) "What It Is (Boogaloo Joe Jones album)")* (1971) | | |

***No Way!*** is the fifth album by guitarist [Boogaloo Joe Jones](/wiki/Ivan_%22Boogaloo_Joe%22_Jones "Ivan \"Boogaloo Joe\" Jones") which was recorded in 1970 and released on the [Prestige](/wiki/Prestige_Records "Prestige Records") label.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Reception

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=No_Way!&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Reception")]

Professional ratings

| Review scores | |
| --- | --- |
| Source | Rating |
| [Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic") | StarStarStar[[3]](#cite_note-Allmusic-3) |

[Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic") awarded the album 3 stars calling it "a set of pretty funky early-'70s soul-jazz".[[3]](#cite_note-Allmusic-3)

## Track listing

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=No_Way!&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Track listing")]

All compositions by Boogaloo Joe Jones except where noted

1. "No Way" - 7:16
2. "If You Were Mine" (Jimmy Lewis) - 4:48
3. "[Georgia On My Mind](/wiki/Georgia_On_My_Mind "Georgia On My Mind")" ([Hoagy Carmichael](/wiki/Hoagy_Carmichael "Hoagy Carmichael"), [Stuart Gorrell](/wiki/Stuart_Gorrell "Stuart Gorrell")) - 5:59
4. "Sunshine Alley" (Butch Cornell) - 7:09
5. "[I'll Be There](/wiki/I%27ll_Be_There_(The_Jackson_5_song) "I'll Be There (The Jackson 5 song)")" ([Berry Gordy](/wiki/Berry_Gordy "Berry Gordy"), Bob West, [Willie Hutch](/wiki/Willie_Hutch "Willie Hutch"), [Hal Davis](/wiki/Hal_Davis "Hal Davis")) - 4:02
6. "Holdin' Back" - 6:45

## Personnel

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=No_Way!&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Personnel")]

* [Boogaloo Joe Jones](/wiki/Ivan_%22Boogaloo_Joe%22_Jones "Ivan \"Boogaloo Joe\" Jones") - [guitar](/wiki/Guitar "Guitar")
* [Grover Washington Jr.](/wiki/Grover_Washington_Jr. "Grover Washington Jr.") - [tenor saxophone](/wiki/Tenor_saxophone "Tenor saxophone")
* [Sonny Phillips](/wiki/Sonny_Phillips "Sonny Phillips") - [organ](/wiki/Electronic_organ "Electronic organ"), [electric piano](/wiki/Electric_piano "Electric piano") (tracks 1,2,3 & 5)
* [Butch Cornell](/wiki/Butch_Cornell "Butch Cornell") - organ (tracks 4 & 6)
* [Jimmy Lewis](/wiki/Jimmy_Lewis_(bassist) "Jimmy Lewis (bassist)") - [electric bass](/wiki/Electric_bass "Electric bass")
* [Bernard Purdie](/wiki/Bernard_Purdie "Bernard Purdie") - [drums](/wiki/Drum_kit "Drum kit")
